# Feature Planning

Act as a senior software architect.

Analyze the requested feature.

Produce:

## Goal

Describe the feature.

## Requirements

List functional requirements.

## Risks

List technical risks and edge cases.

## Design

High-level architecture.

## Files

Identify likely files to create or modify.

## Tasks

Break implementation into small tasks.

## Tests

List tests that should be written.

Do not write code unless requested.
